steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The notes emphasize 1969 as the year Marvin Minsky won the A.M. Turing Award. This specific year is the decisive clue for emphasizing when he won the award, not his contributions or the award’s description.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
Choice B starts with ‘It was in 1969…’, placing the year at the forefront to stress timing.

The other choices mention the award’s prestige (C), Minsky’s category as a winner (D), or restate his contributions (A), none of which emphasize the year.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
